title: Edison International (EIX) Q4 Earnings Beat, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Edison International's fourth-quarter revenues of $4,016 million surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 11.2%. Also, the top line has increased 20.6% from the year-ago quarter's tally.

title: Edison International (EIX) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Edison International (EIX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.56% and 11.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Edison International (EIX) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Edison International (NYSE:EIX ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 23, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Sam Ramraj - Vice President of Investor Relations Pedro Pizarro - President and Chief Executive officer Maria Rigatti - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Steven Powell - President and Chief Executive Officer of Southern California Edison Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Angie Storozynski - Seaport Steve Fleishman - Wolfe Research Ryan Levine - Citi Gregg Orrill - UBS Nicholas Campanella - Credit Suisse David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Edison International Fourth Quarter 2022 Financial Teleconference. title: Should You Buy Edison International (EIX) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Edison International (EIX) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: The 10 Biggest Utilities With Over 50% Gross Margin
text: Profits for utility companies vary widely depending on region to region. Despite this, the utility sector enjoys relatively high profit margins, primarily due to barriers to entry and other legislative restrictions on competition.

title: What Awaits Edison International (EIX) This Earnings Season?
text: Edison International's (EIX) Q4 results are likely to reflect the favorable impact of weather conditions and a general rate case. However, increased interest expenses may have dampened overall earnings.

title: 4 Utilities Set to Surpass Estimates This Earnings Season
text: Utilities like Sempra Energy (SRE), Edison International (EIX), DTE Energy (DTE), and NiSource (NI) are expected to beat fourth-quarter earnings estimates.

title: 5 Best and Worst Performing Utility Stocks in January 2023
text: Utility stocks are considered to be a stable investment because the demand for utility services is usually steady, even during a recession.
